arts.ttl: Daniel Farke left 'exhausted' after Middlesbrough triumph as Leeds United boss salutes players
arts.sum: Daniel Farke was left "exhausted" after Leeds United's enthralling home win over Middlesbrough. Everything looked rosy for the Whites at half-time as they led 1-0 after a scrappy close range finish from Wilfried Gnonto following excellent work down from the right flank from Daniel James.

arts.ttl: Leeds overpower Boro to go top of Championship
arts.sum: Dan James marked his 100th Leeds appearance with a crucial goal as his side beat Middlesbrough 3-1 at Elland Road to regain top spot in the Sky Bet Championship.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as James, Tanaka and Rothwell dazzle in Boro win
arts.sum: A night of suspect kicking from the French goalkeeper, but two very good saves in the second half from Riley McGree and Ben Doak kept Leeds in it as the visitors improved. Big tackle to get the second goal moving.

arts.ttl: Dan James spares Max Wober's blushes as Leeds go top with Middlesbrough win
arts.sum: LEEDS 3-1 MIDDLESBROUGH: Dan James scored on his 100th appearance for the club as Daniel Farke's side moved to the top of the table after a hard-fought Elland Road win

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough create own problems as automatic promotion hopes severely dented in Leeds loss
arts.sum: But Dan James fired Leeds to the top of the Championship with his winning goal in the 74th minute, with Brendan Aaronson sealing the deal in stoppage time for a well-deserved victory. Wilfried Gnonto gave the hosts a half-time lead before Max Wober’s own goal got Boro back on level terms early in the second half.

arts.ttl: Leeds on top as centurion Dan James stars against Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Willy Gnonto and Brenden Aaronson joined the Wales international on the scoresheet.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough player's comments about two Leeds United stars speak volumes
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the game, Smith, who hasn't played since a serious ankle injury in October 2023, picked out Rothwell and Tanaka as two of Leeds' standout players so far this season. Farke decided to start Rothwell and Tanaka in a midfield two after Ethan Ampadu suffered a knee injury against Coventry and that partnership has continued up to Tuesday's clash with Boro at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Gnonto opens scoring for Leeds in fortuitous fashion!
arts.sum: Leeds take the lead against Middlesbrough after Seny Dieng's save comes back off Willy Gnonto and crosses the line!

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Middlesbrough as Daniel Farke rings the changes at Elland Road
arts.sum: The fourth switch does, predictably, see Wilfried Gnonto return, but in place of Manor Solomon rather than Daniel James, who, by recent standards, was facing his turn for rotation tonight. Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Sam Byram, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Max Wober; Ao Tanaka, Joe Rothwell; Daniel James, Brenden Aaronson, Wilfried Gnonto; Mateo Joseph.

arts.ttl: Besiktas 'express' transfer interest in Leeds United man amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: It is a big for United as Firpo has nailed down the left back spot in 2024. There is no sign yet of Firpo extending his United stay.
